sentence: 他收到了老师的一封手书。
pinyin: Tā shōudàole lǎoshī de yī fēng shǒushū.
english: He received a handwritten letter from his teacher.

sentence: 分析师预测今年股市走势良好。
pinyin: Fēnxīshī yùcè jīnnián gǔshì zǒushì liánghǎo.
english: Analysts predict a positive stock market trend this year.

sentence: 学好数据结构对编程很有帮助。
pinyin: Xué hǎo shù jù jié gòu duì biān chéng hěn yǒu bāng zhù.
english: Mastering data structures is very helpful for programming.

meaning: to know all the ins and outs of sth; to get to know (a place) inside o
sentence: 用了两周，我就把这款软件玩转了。
pinyin: Yòng le liǎng zhōu, wǒ jiù bǎ zhè kuǎn ruǎn jiàn wán zhuǎn le.
english: After two weeks of use, I'd learned all the ins and outs of this software.

sentence: 最近油价上涨，开车成本增加了。
pinyin: Zuì jìn yóu jià shàng zhǎng, kāi chē chéng běn zēng jiā le.
english: Oil prices have risen recently, making driving more expensive.
